はぁ～……ワタシとしたことが、罠の解除に失敗するなんて～……。<br>逃げるのに:
*sigh*... I can't believe I of all people botched a trap removal... I
barely got away and couldn't even snag a single gold coin...
あ～～っ、もう！ 悔しい悔しい、悔しい～～～！<br>準備にいっぱいお金使ったの:
Ah, geez! So frustrating, I can't believe it! I spent so much on
preparations and now I'm taking a huge loss...
珍しく暗い顔してるから何かと思ったら、そういうことだったか……。<br>まあ、そ:
You were looking unusually down, so I wondered what happened...
Well, don't let it get to you. It's not like you to dwell on things.
むぅ～～……ワタシだって、落ち込むことくらいあるよ。<br>あのお宝、いい値がつ:
Mmph... Even I get down sometimes, you know... That treasure was
going to fetch a nice price too...
今のは……お前の腹の音か？: That just now... was that your stomach?
うー、聞かれたぁ～……。<br>節約しようと思って、最近、食費ケチってたんだよね:
Ugh, you heard that... I was trying to save money, so I've been cutting
back on food lately...
判断力が鈍ってたのは、そのせいもあるんじゃないか？<br>節約も結構だが、それで:
Don't you think that's why your judgment was off? Saving money's
fine, but if it leads to failure or danger, it's not worth it.
こういう時は、美味いものをいっぱい食べて、いっぱい寝る。<br>これが一番だ。:
In times like this, you should eat lots of good food and get plenty of
sleep. That's the best remedy.
……確かに！ 司令官、いいこと言うね！ よしっ、今日は景気づけに、<br>美味し:
...You're right! Commander, you know what to say! Okay, to lift my
spirits, I'm gonna eat lots of good food! Ah, and you're treating me!
さんざん食って飲んだあげく眠り出しやがった……。<br>まぁ、探索で疲れてたのか:
She ate and drank like there's no tomorrow and then passed out...
Well, she was probably worn out from the expedition.
しかし……ここにこのまま置いていくわけにもいかないしなぁ。<br>ルディア、２階:
But still... I can't just leave her here like this. Ludia, do you have an
empty room upstairs? I'd like to let her sleep it off.
あらあら、随分と紳士な対応だこと。<br>ちょうど空き部屋があるわ。あ、でも寝込:
Oh my, how gentlemanly of you. There just happens to be an empty
room. Ah, but no funny business while she's asleep, alright?
……よし、ここに寝かせておけば問題ないだろ。<br>メリッサ、俺は行くからな……:
...Alright, she should be fine if she sleeps here. Melissa, I'm heading
out... not that you can hear me, asleep as you are.
なっ……！？ お前、起きてたのか……？<br>ていうか、いきなり何を……: Wh—! You were awake...? And what was that all of a sudden...
あはは、お礼のチュウだよ♪<br>司令官、顔真っ赤～。: Ahaha, it's a thank-you kiss!♪ Commander, your face is bright red.
いいから、今日は朝までここで寝とけ。<br>俺は帰るぞ……って、なんだ？ 腕をつ:
Just sleep here till morning. I'm heading back... Hey, what are you
doing? Don't grab my arm.
司令官、言ってたよね？<br>こういう時は、いっぱい食べて寝るのが一番だって。:
Commander, you said it yourself, right? That in times like this, the
best thing is to eat a lot and sleep.
確かに言ったが、それが何だよ？: I did say that, but so what?
だから……ここで一緒に寝よ？: So... how about we sleep together here?
おいおい！ 待てって！ 引っ張るな！<br>し、知らないぞ？ どうなっても……:
Hey, hey! Wait! Don't pull me! I—I'm warning you, I don't know what'll
happen...
